_setup_instructions.project_root: Absolute path to the project root (where package.json lives). Default to current working directory if empty.
_setup_instructions.package_manager: One of: pnpm, npm, yarn, bun. Autodetect from lockfile (pnpm-lock.yaml / package-lock.json / yarn.lock / bun.lockb) — confirm with user if multiple lockfiles or none.
_setup_instructions.styling: One of: tailwind, css-modules, styled-components, emotion, vanilla-extract, cva, tailwind-variants, other. Detect from package.json deps and config files (tailwind.config.*, *.module.css, etc.). Migrations preserve this idiom.
_setup_instructions.target_paths: Array of relative paths to scan, e.g., ["src/", "app/"]. Default to ["src/"] for most projects, ["app/", "components/"] for Next.js app router projects.
_setup_instructions.staleness_days: Days before the cached llms.txt is considered stale and refresh-catalog.sh should rerun. Default 7.
